metric_name: NT server unit shipment growth — actual outcome
metric_value: Windows NT Server unit shipments grew 80% in 1997 (1.3M units vs 732K in 1996); NT became leading server OS by 1998
notes: Per IDC/CNET data: NT outpaced Unix and NetWare in unit growth 1997-1998; prediction directionally verified. Source: https://www.cnet.com/tech/tech-industry/windows-nt-server-market-grows/

metric_value: Unix workstation market declined sharply vs. NT by 2000; Unix server market remained stronger in high-end segments
notes: Unix workstations largely replaced by NT/Windows 2000 by 2001; Unix held high-end server niches. Prediction framework broadly correct.
